name: German Gingerbread Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together well.
2. Make balls of dough the size of walnuts and place them on a greased cookie sheet, spacing them 3-4 inches apart.
3. Flatten each ball with a glass dipped in sugar.
4. Bake at 325°F for 6-8 minutes. Alternatively, refrigerate overnight and roll out cold dough to shape into cookies using cookie cutters. If the dough is sticky, add some flour.
